name: Shadow Fiend
description: A shadow fiend is a dark entity from one of the daemonic planes that is naturally drawn to places of great evil or tragedy. While utterly evil, these fiends are not very aware of their surroundings and often wander aimlessly unless an unwitting humanoid gets too close. They exist partially between planes, giving them an ethereal, translucent appearance that makes them difficult to harm with mundane weapons.
tactics: The shadow fiend relies on its Invisibility Field to ambush targets. It opens by stalking directly toward any creature with the afraid condition, then uses Siphon to drain their life force while they are penalized on their defense. Against creatures not yet afflicted with fear, it uses Dark Claw to whittle down health, prioritizing targets that appear weakest or most isolated. It avoids bright light sources and will retreat from sources of divine energy if outmatched.

actions.name: Dark Claw
actions.description: The shadow fiend rakes a creature with its claws, dealing physical and dark damage. If the target has the afraid condition, this attack deals an additional 2 dark damage that bypasses mitigation.

actions.name: Siphon
actions.description: The shadow fiend latches onto a creature and drains its life force, dealing psychic damage that bypasses mitigation. The shadow fiend heals for the total damage dealt. A creature that has the afraid condition suffers a penalty die on their resilience check to resist this ability.

actions.name: Stalk
actions.description: The shadow fiend moves up to 3 units directly toward a creature that has the afraid condition. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

traits.name: Invisibility Field
traits.description: The shadow fiend is invisible and has the obscured condition unless a humanoid that does not have the afraid condition is within a nearby (2 unit) distance of it.

traits.name: Unstable Form
traits.description: The shadow fiend exists partially between planes. Physical damage from non-silvered, non-magical weapons is halved before applying mitigation.

traits.name: Feed on Fear
traits.description: The shadow fiend can sense any creature with the afraid condition within a far (40 unit) distance regardless of line of sight or barriers.
